details.test: Task 1: Build morning schedule with non-overlapping talks
Task 2: Buy cheapest 3-day festival pass for 1 adult
Task 3: Locate Alex Rivera keynote and copy share link
Task 4: Create varied day-one schedule after 10:00
Task 5: Bookmark two free UX research events as favorites
Task 6: Register for earliest available portfolio review slot
Task 7: Create visit list of prototyping tool exhibitors with 4.0+ rating
Task 8: Subscribe to newsletter with UX and Interaction Design topics
Task 9: Plan walking route from Main Hall to Prototype Lab on day 2
